response.justification: The candidate has some relevant experience with C++ and has worked on various software development projects, but lacks direct experience in industrial automation and specific protocols mentioned in the job description.
strengths: Strong background in software development with diverse technologies
Experience with various programming languages and technologies
concerns: Lack of direct experience in industrial automation
No mention of experience with specific protocols like Modbus TCP/IP, IEC 61850
No clear experience with Secure Development Lifecycle (SDL) practices
